summary: Implemented interleaved thinking + tool call rendering for thinking models. The backend already emits thinking/tool_call/tool_result events in chronological order; the frontend now preserves and renders this sequence. (1) use-rust-agent.ts: exports ThinkingSegment interface and a new thinkingSegments signal that tracks thinking blocks alongside their associated tool call IDs as events arrive. Each thinking event accumulates into the current segment; each tool_call event closes the current thinking block and attaches the tool ID to it. (2) useAgent.ts: passes thinkingSegments through the public API and saves them to message.metadata.thinkingSegments when saving completed/cancelled messages (only when >1 segment exists, i.e. tool calls were interleaved with thinking). (3) LiveStreamingBlock.tsx: rewrote to detect when segments are interleaved and render thinking→tools→thinking sequences live; falls back to the original flat layout when no interleaving detected. (4) MessageBubble.tsx: added InterleavedThinkingSegments component that renders completed messages with the same interleaved layout using stored metadata. When thinkingSegments is in metadata, the old single thinking block at top and the separate tool block are replaced by the interleaved rendering; the message text content is rendered after. Non-thinking messages (no thinkingSegments metadata) use the existing code path unchanged.
